data.title: AutoNation stock falls as Q3 earnings beat estimates: EPS $5.01 (25% YoY), sales $7.037B (7% increase).
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. (NYSE: AN) saw its shares decline following the release of its third-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $5.01, marking a 25% increase compared to the same period last year and surpassing the analyst estimate of $4.82. Quarterly sales reached $7.037 billion, exceeding the expected $6.86 billion. The company experienced a 7% increase in revenue, driven by growth in all key categories. For more information, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Binance founder challenges Peter Schiff's tokenized gold project, calling it "trust-me-bro" asset. Supports Bitcoin.
data.description: Binance (CRYPTO: BNB) founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao challenged economist Peter Schiff's tokenized gold project as not being truly on-chain and labeled it a "trust-me-bro" asset in the ongoing Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) versus gold debate. Schiff introduced a blockchain-based tokenized gold platform under his company Shift Gold, enabling users to purchase, store, transfer digitally, or redeem for physical bullion via a mobile app. Schiff believes tokenized gold on the blockchain adds stability and physical backing to digital assets, providing an alternative to Bitcoin's volatility. CZ's criticism came after Schiff's announcement; the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Investor deadline near: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates Tronox claims. Contact to discuss losses between Feb. 2 and July 30, 2025.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner, James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Tronox to get in touch with him directly to explore their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Tronox from February 2, 2025, to July 30, 2025, and wish to discuss your situation, please contact him.

data.title: Prospanica acquires Techqueria to empower Latino professionals nationwide, uniting business and technology. Expanding reach.
data.description: Prospanica has taken a significant move by broadening its scope to include the country's top Latino tech community. The Association of Hispanic MBAs and Business Professionals, based in Dallas, revealed on October 23, 2025, that they have finalized a deal to incorporate this community.

data.title: Putin criticizes U.S. sanctions as "unfriendly" and vows Russia won't yield. Warns of retaliation if Kyiv is armed.
data.description: Russian President Vladimir V. Putin has cautioned against the Trump administration's intention to provide Kyiv with potent missiles, threatening a strong retaliation in response.
Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt Briefs Members of the Media, Oct. 23, 2025

data.title: Wolters Kluwer announces winners of 2025 CCH William Awards at user conference in San Diego.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Wolters Kluwer Tax & Accounting revealed the recipients of the first-ever CCH William Awards at the 2025 CCH Connections User Conference in San Diego, California. The accolades were bestowed upon firms and professionals who embody clarity in complexity, innovation in practice, and leadership in transformation, echoing the principles of CCH founder William KixMiller. This event recognized winners who excelled in these values.

data.title: Berry Consultants releases FACTS 8 Clinical Trial Simulator; new version available globally for designing and simulating clinical trials.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Berry Consultants, LLC has unveiled FACTS 8, the newest iteration of its renowned Fixed and Adaptive Clinical Trial Simulator. FACTS 8 is now accessible globally to both current users and new customers. Widely considered the top choice in the industry, FACTS offers unparalleled capabilities for crafting and modeling clinical trials throughout the drug development process. This spans from initial Phase I trials to intricate, multi-arm platform trials. The latest release brings significant improvements, enhancing users' ability to efficiently plan and simulate diverse clinical trial scenarios.

data.title: Leopard Imaging launches camera solutions based on onsemi's Hyperlux™ ID, LP, LH image sensors.
data.description: In Fremont, California on October 23, 2025, Leopard Imaging Inc., a prominent figure in embedded AI vision solutions worldwide, unveils its new range of camera options driven by Hyperlux™ ID, Hyperlux™ LP, Hyperlux™ LH image sensors from onsemi. This launch marks a significant moment for the company, showcasing its commitment to cutting-edge technology and innovation in the field.

data.title: Life Time announces 2026 Grand Prix Series with enhanced selection process and bigger prize purse; application opens Oct 27.
data.description: The fifth season of the leading off-road cycling series will feature an enhanced selection process and a boosted prize purse. The application window is set to open on October 27. Life Time, a prominent healthy lifestyle brand and sports events organizer, based in Chanhassen, Minnesota, announced these updates on October 23, 2025. The series promises increased opportunities and rewards for participants, with a focus on delivering top-tier experiences.

data.title: Belmont Village partners with Best Buddies International for workforce inclusion in Houston.
data.description: Belmont Village Senior Living in Houston is strengthening their commitment to workforce inclusion through a partnership with Best Buddies International. The collaboration aims to promote diversity and support individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities. This initiative will impact a significant number of employees at Belmont Village Senior Living and ultimately contribute to creating a more inclusive work environment.

data.title: Mark Roberts of Crow Holdings Capital and SMU Cox’s Folsom Institute named recipient of PREA's Graaskamp Research Award.
data.description: In Dallas, Texas, Crow Holdings and the Robert and Margaret Folsom Institute for Real Estate at SMU’s Cox School of Business have shared news of Mark Roberts, CFA, AIA, being honored. Roberts serves as the Managing Director of Research at Crow Holdings Capital (CHC) and as the Director of Research at the Folsom Institute. He has been selected as the recipient of the 2025 Pension Real Estate Association (PREA) Graaskamp Research Award. This prestigious recognition highlights Roberts' significant contributions to the real estate sector.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Lantheus investors; bought between Feb 26, 2025 and Aug 5, 2025. Contact for losses discussion.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Lantheus to reach out to him personally to explore their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Lantheus during the period from February 26, 2025, to August 5, 2025, and wish to discuss this matter, please consider contacting him.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts offers free car washes at 11 Detroit locations for Customer Appreciation Weekend, October 24-26, 2025.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio and Detroit, a leading express car wash operator, Express Wash Concepts (EWC), revealed a Customer Appreciation Weekend at 11 Clean Express Auto Wash locations in the Detroit metro area. The event presents a special offer of free services to customers. EWC is known as one of the rapidly expanding express car wash businesses in the United States.
